intent: Minimum-feasible boundary test (deep-of-square (ratio 0.85) lot) for baths_ds_gr from the 2026-07-13 lot-size sweep (see floorplan_v1/LOT_SIZE_SWEEP_FINDINGS.md). 14.45x17.0 lot, 135.85 m2 floor -- smallest size in the tested grid that still solves + validates cleanly at this ratio. No carport.
